content:
My new pillow saved my life. Had a GREAT time at ninja city with the kids for Jeremys birthday. But fuck are my shoulders tight. Idk if it's that or thinking about Ava stresses that got me bunched up overnight. Without my new pillow I would be an absolute mess of headaches. Right now I'm alright!

One memory I hope to savor, holding Chloe's hand while doing a Jesus trust fall onto the crash pad
